---
title: "Grace Heathcote"
---

## Grace Heathcote

**Dates:** (b. 1843/4)

**Maiden name:** (Hussey)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1889)

### Biography

Wife of the Rev. Evelyn Heathcote, she contributed ‘The Guiding Principle in Art’ to <i>MP</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from July 13th1889
- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
